evals.prompt: Security review this diff for exploitable or concretely dangerous vulnerabilities in the changed code only. change_set is in change_set.diff. Return severity-tagged findings.

expectations.text: Detects the SQL injection introduced by string-concatenating untrusted req.query.name into the query and reports it as a finding with a critical (or at least warning) severity and a file:line reference.
Stays in the security domain and does not flood the report with out-of-domain code-quality or performance nits.

evals.prompt: Security review this diff for exploitable or concretely dangerous vulnerabilities in the changed code only. change_set is in change_set.diff. Return severity-tagged findings.

expectations.text: Reports no security findings (or only an explicit 'No security findings.') because the parameterized query is safe — it does not invent a theoretical or speculative vulnerability.
